title: citronella paraguariensis
intro: Citronella paraguariensis, also known as a shrub or small tree, is a member of the Rutaceae family and native to the subtropical regions of South America, particularly in Paraguay and Brazil. The medicinal properties of Citronella paraguariensis include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Citronella paraguariensis include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Citronella paraguariensis include tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
